## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] UI Polish (visual improvements)
- [ ] AI / LLM changes
- [ ] Documentation / Infrastructure

## Quality Assurance Checklist

- [ ] Build passed (`bun run build`)
- [ ] Lint passed (`bun run lint`)
- [ ] Formatting passed (`bun run format`)
- [ ] No unintended AI behavior changes
- [ ] No unintended data/schema/storage changes
- [ ] No unintended logging/scoring changes
- [ ] Mobile smoke test completed

## Feature-Specific Testing

- [ ] Screenshots/videos added for UI changes
- [ ] Active workout tested (if relevant)
- [ ] Graph toggles tested (if relevant)
- [ ] Quick logs tested (if relevant)
- [ ] AI launcher tested (if relevant)
